positive: A minimalist geometric owl perched on a stylized crescent moon, rendered in deep indigo and burnt orange tones. The owl features clean, sharp lines and stylized feathers, embodying a nocturnal grace. The moon and owl are framed by simple, elegant celestial mandalas and abstract constellations, creating a strong silhouette effect. The overall composition is highly symmetrical and suitable for repeating apparel patterns. Clean vector illustration style, vibrant contrast, graphic design aesthetic, centered, perfect for DTG printing.
